questions.question: What is the total revenue over the entire period? What is the average daily revenue?
questions.hint: Use the transactions table and GROUP BY date

questions.question: Which day of the week generates the most revenue? Is there a weekend vs weekday pattern?
questions.hint: Join transactions with calendar to get day_of_week

questions.question: How does revenue change around payday (25th-end of month)? Quantify the payday uplift.
What are the top 10 products by revenue? What product categories drive the most sales?
questions.hint: Join transaction_items with products, GROUP BY product or category

questions.question: Which products have the most stockouts? How much revenue is lost due to stockouts?
questions.hint: Filter transaction_items WHERE had_stockout = 1, calculate (quantity_wanted - quantity_sold) * unit_price

questions.question: How many unique customers are there? What is the average basket size and visit frequency?
questions.hint: COUNT DISTINCT customer_id, AVG(total_amount_thb), visits per customer

questions.question: Do high-income customers spend differently from low-income customers? Compare basket size, visit frequency, and product preferences.
questions.hint: Join transactions with customers, GROUP BY income_bracket

questions.question: Which customers are at risk of churning? What signals predict churn?
questions.hint: Check customer_lifecycle for at_risk/churned transitions. What do these customers have in common?

questions.question: What is the total waste cost? Which products contribute most to waste?
questions.hint: Use waste_log, join with products, GROUP BY product

questions.question: If you had 10,000 THB budget, what single action would have the biggest impact on revenue? Justify with data.
questions.hint: Consider: win-back campaigns, stockout reduction, promotions, product mix changes
